violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took out of service to be washed/sanitized. PIC disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

Lactic acid sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 1875 parts per million (ppm). A lactic acid sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 704-1875 ppm. PIC added water to sanitizer. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025
Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. PIC placed statement during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024
